news.title: Why Iran war oil price shock won't stop Fed pick Kevin Warsh from cutting interest rates
news.summary: President Donald Trump's choice to lead the Federal Reserve sees inflation risk very differently than Chairman Jerome Powell.

news.title: Lawmakers to introduce bill strengthening federal anti-poverty program: It's 'a critical lifeline,' Warren says
news.summary: Supplemental Security Income, or SSI, was created in 1972 to help the nation's most vulnerable. Some features of the program have not been updated in decades.

news.title: Spain rejects White House claim it agreed to cooperate with U.S. forces amid Iran war
news.summary: The White House says Spain will now cooperate with the U.S. militarily over the Iran conflict. Madrid swiftly rejected this claim.

news.title: U.S. crude oil touches highest level since June 2025 after Iran says it attacked a tanker
news.summary: Oil prices have surged about 15% this week as the U.S.-Iran war engulfs the Middle East.

news.title: 安排超长期特别国债2500亿元支持消费品以旧换新
news.summary: 两会新华社快讯：政府工作报告在介绍2026年政府工作任务时提出，促进商品消费扩容升级，安排超长期特别国债2500亿元支持消费品以旧换新，优化政策实施机制。设立1000亿元财政金融协同促内需专项资金

news.title: 2025年全年经济社会发展主要目标任务顺利完成
news.summary: 两会新华社快讯：政府工作报告说，2025年是很不平凡的一年。党的二十届四中全会胜利召开，擘画了未来五年我国发展的宏伟蓝图。我们隆重纪念中国人民抗日战争暨世界反法西斯战争胜利80周年，设立台湾光复纪念日

news.title: 李强在政府工作报告中指出，“十四五”圆满收官，中国式现代化迈出新的坚实步伐
news.summary: 新华社北京3月5日电国务院总理李强5日在政府工作报告中指出，2025年是很不平凡的一年。党的二十届四中全会胜利召开，擘画了未来五年我国发展的宏伟蓝图。我们隆重纪念中国人民抗日战争暨世界反法西斯战争胜利

news.title: The U.S. insists the Iran conflict won't be a 'forever war.' Experts beg to differ
news.summary: President Trump and his officials say the war won't be protracted. Experts say it could go on longer than the White House expects.

news.title: Iran war threatens $11.7 trillion global travel industry as passengers get caught in crossfire
news.summary: Travelers who are far from falling missiles, drone attacks and other geopolitical flashpoints aren't immune to ripple effects.

news.title: Is Cuba next? What the fallout from the Iran war means for Havana
news.summary: Speculation about what's next for Havana comes as the U.S. continues to attack Iran and shortly after Trump ordered U.S. forces to depose Venezuela's president.

news.title: Iran war and stocks: Why Global X says 'it might be time to double down' on emerging markets
news.summary: It may be time to dive deeper into the emerging markets trade.

news.title: BlackRock’s target-date funds are about to get riskier. Here’s what you need to know.
news.summary: Hiking risk between the ages of 45 and 60 could result in greater retirement wealth about 75% of the time, the asset manager said.

news.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
news.summary: Oil prices rise again, stocks are flat, and Broadcom delivers a fantastic quarter.

news.title: The wealthy once rushed to Dubai. Now they're scrambling to leave
news.summary: Since the start of the U.S.-Iran war, Dubai's status as a haven for the global elite has been shattered.

news.title: Defense experts back Anthropic in letter to Congress, slam DOD for setting 'dangerous precedent'
news.summary: Former defense and intelligence officials and policy experts are urging Congress to investigate the Pentagon's labeling of Anthropic as a supply chain risk.

news.title: 5 unresolved questions hanging over the Anthropic–Pentagon fracas: 'It's all very puzzling'
news.summary: Plenty of unknowns remain after Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth designated Anthropic a "Supply-Chain Risk to National Security" on Friday.

news.title: Berkshire Hathaway begins repurchasing shares, CEO Greg Abel buys $15 million in stock
news.summary: The 62-year-old executive's purchase came a little more than two months into his tenure running the Omaha, Nebraska-based conglomerate.
